changeSet.author: CIV developer
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.menu SET is_active = false WHERE element_id IN ( 'menu_pathology', 'menu_immunochem', 'menu_notebook', 'menu_aliquot', 'menu_cytology', 'menu_microbiology', 'menu_microbiology_tb', 'menu_microbiology_classic', 'menu_study_sample_eorder', 'menu_sample_create', 'menu_billing', 'menu_patient_create' );
